pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Year", "Trial phase", "Number of arms", "Total sample size", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA" FROM clinical_trials WHERE ("Cancer type" = 'Gastric' OR "Cancer type" = 'Gastric cancer' OR "Cancer type" = 'Gastroesophageal junction cancer' OR "Cancer type" = 'Gastric/gastroesophageal junction cancer') AND ("Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4' OR "Name of ICI" = 'CTLA-4 inhibitor' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%CTLA-4%') AND "Year" >= 2018;

natural_question: Find Bladder cancer studies included in a meta-analysis that used PD-L1 agents?
question_used: Find Bladder cancer studies included in a meta-analysis that used PD-L1 agents?

pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Lines of treatment", "Total sample size", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' AND "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%2%' OR "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%3%' OR "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%4%';
raw_model_output: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Lines of treatment", "Total sample size", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' AND "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%2%' OR "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%3%' OR "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%4%';

natural_question: What phase 3 trials for Mesothelioma compared chemotherapy to a combination of BRAF and MEK inhibitors?
question_used: What phase 3 trials for Mesothelioma compared chemotherapy to a combination of BRAF and MEK inhibitors?
pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Total sample size", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"

  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Total sample size", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?" pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "PubMed ID", "Total sample size", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Clinical setting" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Year" >= 2010 AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Pembrolizumab%' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up';
raw_model_output: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "PubMed ID", "Total sample size", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Clinical setting" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Year" >= 2010 AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Pembrolizumab%' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up';

natural_question: Which trials for colorectal cancer specified neoadjuvant use of immune checkpoint inhibitors?
question_used: Which trials for colorectal cancer specified neoadjuvant use of immune checkpoint inhibitors?

  AND "Clincal setting in relation to surgery" = 'Neoadjuvant'

natural_question: Which trials for esophageal or gastroesophageal junction cancer had at least 4 arms and used chemotherapy as a control?

natural_question: List Cemiplimab trials for Urothelial cancer with overall follow-up longer than 21 months?
question_used: List Cemiplimab trials for Urothelial cancer with overall follow-up longer than 21 months?
pred_sql:

FROM clinical_trials 
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial'

natural_question: Find studies of small cell lung cancer included in a meta-analysis that used PD-L1 or CTLA-4 agents?
question_used: Find studies of small cell lung cancer included in a meta-analysis that used PD-L1 or CTLA-4 agents?

FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small cell lung cancer' AND ("Class of ICI" IN ('PD-L1', 'PD1', 'PD-L1, CTLA-4', 'PD1, CTLA-4') OR "Name of ICI" IN ('Atezolizumab','Pembrolizumab','Nivolumab','Durvalumab','Avelumab')) AND "Originsinal publication or Follow-up" IS NOT NULL;

natural_question: Find studies of renal cell cancer included in a meta-analysis that used both PD1 and CTLA-4 agents?
question_used: Find studies of renal cell cancer included in a meta-analysis that used both PD1 and CTLA-4 agents?
pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Trial phase" 
FROM clinical_trials 
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' 
  AND "Class of ICI" IN ('PD1', 'PD-L1') 
  AND "Name of ICI" IN ('Nivolumab','Pembrolizumab','Atezolizumab','Avelumab') 
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM clinical_trials t2
    WHERE t2."NCT" = clinical_trials."NCT"
      AND t2."Name of ICI" IN ('Nivolumab','Pembrolizumab','Atezolizumab','Avelumab')
      AND t2."Class of ICI" IN ('PD1','PD-L1')
  );

pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Total sample size", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Breast' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Type of control" = 'Chemo' AND ("Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' OR "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy');

natural_question: Which phase 3 bladder cancer trials compared chemotherapy to immunotherapy?
question_used: Which phase 3 bladder cancer trials compared chemotherapy to immunotherapy?
pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of compare" 
FROM clinical_trials 
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Bladder' 
  AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3'
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" IN ('Monotherapy','Combination')
  AND (/* chemotherapy vs immunotherapy comparison */ 
       "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%chemotherapy%' AND "Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL
       OR "Treatment regimen" NOT LIKE '%chemotherapy%' AND "Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL) 
LIMIT 0;

SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Monotherapy/combination", "Number of arms", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Cancer type", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hodgkin Lymphoma'
  AND "Number of arms" >= 2
  AND "Control regimen" ILIKE '%Antibody-drug conjugate%'
  AND "Type of control" = 'Antibody-drug conjugate' ;

FROM clinical_trials

  AND "Type of control" = 'Antibody-drug conjugate' ;

pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND ( "Class of ICI" = 'PD-L1' OR "Class of ICI" = 'PD1' OR "Class of ICI" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' OR "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4' ) AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3';
raw_model_output: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND ( "Class of ICI" = 'PD-L1' OR "Class of ICI" = 'PD1' OR "Class of ICI" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' OR "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4' ) AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3';

natural_question: Find studies of renal cell cancer included in a meta-analysis that used both PD1 and CTLA-4 agents?
question_used: Find studies of renal cell cancer included in a meta-analysis that used both PD1 and CTLA-4 agents?
pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Trial phase" 
FROM clinical_trials 
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' 
  AND "Class of ICI" IN ('PD1', 'PD-L1') 
  AND "Name of ICI" IN ('Nivolumab','Pembrolizumab','Atezolizumab','Avelumab') 
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM clinical_trials t2
    WHERE t2."NCT" = clinical_trials."NCT"
      AND t2."Name of ICI" IN ('Nivolumab','Pembrolizumab','Atezolizumab','Avelumab')
      AND t2."Class of ICI" IN ('PD1','PD-L1')
  );
raw_model_output:

  AND "Class of ICI" IN ('PD1', 'PD-L1')

question_used: Find Phase 2 trials of Atezolizumab, Trastuzumab emtansine, and Placebo for Breast cancer that are original publications?

raw_model_output: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE ("Trial phase" = 'Phase 2') AND ("Treatment regimen" IN ('Atezolizumab', 'Trastuzumab emtansine', 'Placebo') OR "Name of ICI" IN ('Atezolizumab', 'Trastuzumab emtansine')) AND "Cancer type" = 'Breast' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication' AND ("Treatment regimen" = 'Atezolizumab' OR "Treatment regimen" = 'Trastuzumab emtansine' OR "Treatment regimen" = 'Placebo');

natural_question: Show trials for small cell lung cancer using PD-L1 and CTLA-4 inhibitors conducted in 2018 or later?
question_used: Show trials for small cell lung cancer using PD-L1 and CTLA-4 inhibitors conducted in 2018 or later?
pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small cell lung cancer' AND ("Class of ICI" LIKE 'PD-L1%' OR "Class of ICI" = 'PD-L1') AND ("Class of ICI" LIKE 'CTLA-4%' OR "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%CTLA-4%') AND "Year" >= 2018;

natural_question: What are the study details, including primary endpoints, for Small Cell Lung cancer trials testing immune checkpoint inhibitors plus chemotherapy?
question_used: What are the study details, including primary endpoints, for Small Cell Lung cancer trials testing immune checkpoint inhibitors plus chemotherapy?
pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint" 
FROM clinical_trials 
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung' 
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
  AND ("Name of ICI" LIKE '%CheckPoint%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%PD-L1%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Nivolumab%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Pembrolizumab%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Atezolizumab%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Durvalumab%')
  AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Chemotherapy%' 
  AND "Clincal setting in relation to surgery" IN ('Metastatic+recurrent (unresectable)', 'Relapsed/refractory');
raw_model_output:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint" 
FROM clinical_trials 
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung' 
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
  AND ("Name of ICI" LIKE '%CheckPoint%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%PD-L1%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Nivolumab%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Pembrolizumab%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Atezolizumab%' OR "Name of ICI" LIKE '%Durvalumab%')
  AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Chemotherapy%' 
  AND "Clincal setting in relation to surgery" IN ('Metastatic+recurrent (unresectable)', 'Relapsed/refractory');

natural_question: Which trials for Head and Neck cancer used Chemo/Anti-EGFR plus Radiotherapy as a control?

natural_question: Show trials for breast cancer patients who received at least 2 prior treatments using a combination of therapies?
question_used: Show trials for breast cancer patients who received at least 2 prior treatments using a combination of therapies?
pred_sql:

pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Pancreatic' AND "Clincal setting in relation to surgery" = 'Neoadjuvant' AND ("Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL OR "Class of ICI" IS NOT NULL);
raw_model_output: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Pancreatic' AND "Clincal setting in relation to surgery" = 'Neoadjuvant' AND ("Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL OR "Class of ICI" IS NOT NULL);

natural_question: List trials for Renal cell cancer using Nivolumab and Ipilimumab with overall follow-up longer than 21 months?
question_used: List trials for Renal cell cancer using Nivolumab and Ipilimumab with overall follow-up longer than 21 months?

natural_question: Which Phase 2 trials combining PD1 and CTLA-4 for Head and Neck cancer should I review, and what were their treatment regimens?
question_used: Which Phase 2 trials combining PD1 and CTLA-4 for Head and Neck cancer should I review, and what were their treatment regimens?
pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Head and Neck' 
  AND ("Trial phase" = 'Phase 2')
  AND ("Name of ICI" LIKE '%PD1%' OR "Class of ICI" LIKE '%PD1%')
  AND ("Name of ICI" LIKE '%CTLA-4%' OR "Class of ICI" LIKE '%CTLA-4%')
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Trials phase", "Cancer type" 
FROM clinical_trials 
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung cancer' 
  AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' 
  AND ("Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy' OR "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination') 
  AND ("Type of control" = 'Chemotherapy' OR "Control regimen" LIKE '%Chemotherapy%');
raw_model_output:

FROM clinical_trials 
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung cancer' 
  AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' 
  AND ("Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy' OR "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination') 
  AND ("Type of control" = 'Chemotherapy' OR "Control regimen" LIKE '%Chemotherapy%');

natural_question: Which Melanoma studies combined immunotherapy, chemotherapy, and anti-VEGF agents, and what were their primary endpoints?

pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Year", "Trial phase", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA"

natural_question: List the trials for PD-L1 or CTLA-4 that used co-primary endpoints, including the trial identifier, author, year, class of immune checkpoint inhibitor, name of the immune checkpoint inhibitor, and primary endpoint?
question_used: List the trials for PD-L1 or CTLA-4 that used co-primary endpoints, including the trial identifier, author, year, class of immune checkpoint inhibitor, name of the immune checkpoint inhibitor, and primary endpoint?
pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Class of ICI", "Name of ICI", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?" AS "Primary Endpoint Type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" IN ('Yes', 'No') AND "Class of ICI" IN ('PD-L1', 'PD-L1, CTLA-4', 'PD1', 'PD1, CTLA-4') AND "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?" = 'Co-primary' OR "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?" = 'Co-primary endpoints' OR "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?" = 'Co-primary endpoints?';

SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?" 
FROM clinical_trials 
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' 
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' 
  AND "Name of ICI" LIKE '%ICI%' 
  AND "Class of ICI" IN ('PD-L1', 'PD1', 'PD-L1, CTLA-4', 'PD1, CTLA-4', 'CTLA-4') 
  AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%ICI%';
raw_model_output:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?" 
FROM clinical_trials 
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' 
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' 
  AND "Name of ICI" LIKE '%ICI%' 
  AND "Class of ICI" IN ('PD-L1', 'PD1', 'PD-L1, CTLA-4', 'PD1, CTLA-4', 'CTLA-4') 
  AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%ICI%';

natural_question: List trials for non-small cell lung cancer with a follow-up duration of at least 21 months?
question_used: List trials for non-small cell lung cancer with a follow-up duration of at least 21 months?
pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Total sample size", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Non-small cell lung cancer' AND (CAST("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" AS NUMERIC) >= 21 OR CAST("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx" AS NUMERIC) >= 21 OR CAST("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" AS NUMERIC) >= 21);

natural_question: Which Phase 3 combination immunotherapy trials for hepatocellular carcinoma used both PD1 and CTLA-4 inhibitors, and what were their treatment regimens?
question_used: Which Phase 3 combination immunotherapy trials for hepatocellular carcinoma used both PD1 and CTLA-4 inhibitors, and what were their treatment regimens?
pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Total sample size", "Cancer type", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hepatocellular carcinoma' 
  AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3'
  AND "Name of ICI" IN ('PD1','PD-L1','PD-1') 
  AND "Class of ICI" IN ('PD1','PD-L1', 'PD-L1, CTLA-4')
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination'
  AND "Type of combination" LIKE '%ICI+%CTLA-4%' 
  AND "Name of ICI" IN ('Nivolumab', 'Pembrolizumab', 'Atezolizumab') 
ORDER BY "Year" ASC;

FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hepatocellular carcinoma' 
  AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3'
  AND "Name of ICI" IN ('PD1','PD-L1','PD-1') 
  AND "Class of ICI" IN ('PD1','PD-L1', 'PD-L1, CTLA-4')

  AND "Name of ICI" IN ('Nivolumab', 'Pembrolizumab', 'Atezolizumab')

natural_question: What phase 2 trials for esophageal or gastroesophageal junction cancer compared immunotherapy to chemotherapy, anti-EGFR therapy, and radiotherapy?

  AND (
    "Control regimen" LIKE '%chemotherapy%' OR
    "Control regimen" LIKE '%anti-EGFR%' OR
    "Control regimen" LIKE '%radiotherapy%' OR
    "Type of control" IN ('Chemo', 'Observation') 
  );

natural_question: List the trials for Mesothelioma treated with Nivolumab and Ipilimumab that had more than 21 months of overall follow-up?
question_used: List the trials for Mesothelioma treated with Nivolumab and Ipilimumab that had more than 21 months of overall follow-up?
pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Primary endpoint", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" 
FROM clinical_trials 
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' 
  AND "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab' || 'Ipilimumab'
  AND CAST("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" AS NUMERIC) > 21;

natural_question: Find trials for gastric or gastroesophageal junction cancer using CTLA-4 where PD-L1 positivity was not an inclusion criterion?
question_used: Find trials for gastric or gastroesophageal junction cancer using CTLA-4 where PD-L1 positivity was not an inclusion criterion?

natural_question: Show trials for pancreatic cancer using PD-L1 and CTLA-4 where PD-L1 positivity was required for participation?
question_used: Show trials for pancreatic cancer using PD-L1 and CTLA-4 where PD-L1 positivity was required for participation?

natural_question: What were the years and names of immune checkpoint inhibitor treatments used in phase 2 trials for colorectal cancer that evaluated Durvalumab and Tremelimumab?
question_used: What were the years and names of immune checkpoint inhibitor treatments used in phase 2 trials for colorectal cancer that evaluated Durvalumab and Tremelimumab?
pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Trial phase" 
FROM clinical_trials 
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' 
  AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2' 
  AND ("Name of ICI" IN ('Durvalumab', 'Tremelimumab')) 
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy' OR "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

question_used: Find studies of gastric or gastroesophageal junction cancer that used PD-L1 inhibitors and were included in a meta-analysis?
pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" 
FROM clinical_trials 
WHERE ("Cancer type" IN ('Gastric', 'Gastroesophageal junction')) 
  AND "Name of ICI" IS NOT NULL 
  AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" IN ('Yes', 'No') 
  AND "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?" IS NOT NULL
  AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 WHERE "Author" IS NOT NULL) 
LIMIT 100;

raw_model_output: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Total sample size", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Lines of treatment", "Clinical setting", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' AND "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%2%' OR "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%3%' OR "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%4%';

natural_question: What phase 3 clinical trials for Mesothelioma compared chemotherapy to BRAFi and MEKi inhibitors?
question_used: What phase 3 clinical trials for Mesothelioma compared chemotherapy to BRAFi and MEKi inhibitors?
pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Year" >= 2010 AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Chemotherapy%' AND ("Name of ICI" IS NULL OR "Name of ICI" = '') AND ("Type of control" = 'Chemo' OR "Control regimen" LIKE '%Chemo%') AND ("Treatment regimen" LIKE '%BRAFi%' OR "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%MEKi%') AND ("Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' OR "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy');
raw_model_output: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Control regimen", "Type of control", "Lines of treatment", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Primary endpoint", "Priamry Multiple, composite, or co-primary endpoints?", "Secondary endpoint", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Type of follow-up given", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control", "Type of therapy", "Control arm", "Clinical setting", "Included in MA" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Year" >= 2010 AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' AND "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%Chemotherapy%' AND ("Name of ICI" IS NULL OR "Name of ICI" = '') AND ("Type of control" = 'Chemo' OR "Control regimen" LIKE '%Chemo%') AND ("Treatment regimen" LIKE '%BRAFi%' OR "Treatment regimen" LIKE '%MEKi%') AND ("Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination' OR "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy');

natural_question: Show trials for renal cell cancer with at least 2 prior therapies that used a combination treatment?
question_used: Show trials for renal cell cancer with at least 2 prior therapies that used a combination treatment?
pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name", "Total sample size", "Monotherapy/combination", "Type of combination", "Name of ICI", "Treatment regimen", "Cancer type", "Clincal setting in relation to surgery", "Trial phase" 
FROM clinical_trials 
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' 
  AND "Lines of treatment" LIKE '%2 prior%' 
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

natural_question: Find Renal cell cancer trials that used a combination treatment and included patients with at least 1 prior line of therapy?

natural_question: List trials for bladder cancer that do not require a biomarker for inclusion?
question_used: List trials for bladder cancer that do not require a biomarker for inclusion?
pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Primary endpoint" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Bladder' AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No' AND "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion" = 'No';
raw_model_output: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion", "Primary endpoint" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Bladder' AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No' AND "Is any other biomarker used for inclusion" = 'No';
